GenAiPlugin.description: Provide insights on sales performance and areas for improvement. This topic is chosen when analyzing sales data.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query is about performance analytics, use Get_Opportunities2.
Always clarify the date range or specific criteria for the performance data.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only provide performance analytics and insights. This may include generating reports and identifying areas for improvement.
